properties.entry: INSERT INTO reservation (user_id, room_id, room_name, name, check_in, check_out, adult_count, child_count, total_price, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '예약완료')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE room_id = ? AND status = '예약완료' AND (check_in < ? AND check_out > ?)
SELECT room_id, check_in, check_out FROM reservation WHERE status = '예약완료' AND check_out >= CURDATE()
